confirmed.title: Cell React.memo 全滅 — renderCellContent 每 render 造 3 個新 inline closure props
confirmed.mechanism: cell-registry 2026-05-13 perf fix 已把每個 cell type 包成 module-level cached `React.memo(CellWithSurface)`,但 data-table.tsx renderCellContent 每次 render 傳 `onCommit={(next) => commitCell(rowId, colId, next)}`、`onCommitLive={(next) => onCellCommit?.(...)}`、`onRequestEdit={() => ...}` 三個全新 arrow closure(+`meta={meta ?? {}}` 在 meta undefined 時每次新 object)→ memo shallow-compare 100% fail → memo 只剩比較開銷、零命中。後果:DataTableInner 任何一次 re-render(virtualizer range change 每 ~40px 捲動、column resize `onChange` mode 每 mousemove、drag 中 dropIndicator 每次跨 row、spreadsheet 每次 arrow-key/click、portal edit mode 每 keystroke setEditingDraft)都讓全部 visible cells(~20 rows × N cols ≈ 100-300 個)的 Field display subtree(Input/Select/DatePicker/PeoplePicker + FieldSurfaceProvider ×2)整棵重渲。這正是檔內註解「240ms/frame catastrophe」要解的路徑 — memo 修了 component identity(mount/unmount cascade)但 props identity 沒修,防線靜默失效。
confirmed.suggestion: 加一層中介 memo slot:`const MemoCellSlot = React.memo(function CellSlot({ Cell, rowId, colId, value, meta, mode, size, autoRowHeight, isEditable, isDisabled, onCommitCell, onCancelCell, onCellCommitLive, onEnterEdit }) { const onCommit = useCallback((n) => onCommitCell(rowId, colId, n), [onCommitCell, rowId, colId]); ... return <Cell ... /> })`。傳入的 callbacks(commitCell / exitEdit / onCellCommit / setEditingCellId)全部已是 stable useCallback,rowId/colId/value 是 primitive → memo 真命中。meta fallback 改 module-level `const EMPTY_META = {}`。修完後 unchanged cells 在上述全部熱路徑 render 成本歸零,是本元件單一最高槓桿修法。

verdict.reason: Verified, could not refute. (1) Pattern real: data-table.tsx:1353-1356 passes 3 fresh arrow closures (onCommit/onCommitLive/onRequestEdit) + meta ?? {} fresh object per render; only onCancel=exitEdit is useCallback-stable. (2) Mechanism correct: cell-registry.tsx:510 wraps all cell types in React.memo with default shallow compare, so the fresh closures defeat memo on 100% of renders; no memoized Row layer above (zero React.memo in data-table.tsx, cells render inline via renderCellContent at 1672/1718), so every DataTableInner re-render re-renders all visible cells. (3) All claimed triggers confirmed as DataTableInner state: editingDraft per-keystroke (L853 + onDraft={setEditingDraft} L2601), spreadsheet selection (L862-864), dropIndicator (L2132), TanStack columnSizing read in render (L1048, per-mousemove in onChange resize), useVirtual scroll. (4) Cost above noise: display cells are full Field-family subtrees (DatePicker/Select/Combobox/PeoplePicker naked display + FieldSurfaceProvider ×2, cell-registry.tsx:232-369) × 100-300 visible cells per frame during sustained interactions. Downgrade from implied P0: component identity half of the 2026-05-13 fix still works (no mount/unmount cascade), so this is wasted re-render work (~tens of ms/frame), not the 240ms catastrophe — significant hot-path perf bug, functional product.

confirmed.title: Filter 求值熱路徑 per-row 重複解析 — dateMs 對常數 filterValue 每 row 重 parse + operator registry 每 row 線性掃描
confirmed.mechanism: TanStack globalFilterFn 逐 row 呼 evaluateTree,每 row 重做四類常數工作:(1) `tree.children.filter(isConditionComplete)` → getOperatorSpecLoose 對 OPERATOR_REGISTRY 全 11 type × ~6-13 ops(約百餘 entries)線性 .find — 10k rows × 3 conditions ≈ 150 萬次比較/一次 filter pass;(2) 2026-07-04 Q6 新增的 dateMs():date ops 兩側都 `new Date(String(v))`,day 精度再 `startOfDay(d)` 多 alloc 一個 Date — filterValue 是跨全 rows 不變的常數卻每 row 重 parse。量化:10k rows × 3 date conditions = 60k dateMs 呼叫 ≈ 120k Date 物件 + 60k 字串 parse ≈ 每次求值 20-60ms + GC 壓力,其中 filterValue 側 50% 完全冗餘;(3) is_relative 每 row 重算 relativeKeyToRange(startOfWeek/endOfDay/addDays 每次 4-10 個 Date alloc → 10k rows 可達 ~10 萬 Date);(4) 文字 ops 每 row 重做 `String(filterValue).toLowerCase()`。每次 filter panel 互動(改 field/op/value)都觸發整輪重求值。
confirmed.suggestion: 求值前 compile 一次、row loop 只轉 cellValue 側:用 `WeakMap<FilterCondition, PreparedCondition>` cache(或 evaluateTree 開頭先把 completed conditions + per-condition prepared 資料算好再進 row loop — 但 globalFilterFn 是 per-row 簽名,WeakMap key 到 condition 物件即可,tree identity 在一輪 pass 內穩定)。Prepared 內容:opSpec lookup、parsed filter date ms(day/ms 精度已套)、lowercased filter string、person id array、relative range [start,end]。修完 filterValue 側成本從 O(rows×conditions) 降 O(conditions),10k rows 場景省 ~50-80% filter 求值時間。

verdict.reason: All four sub-claims verified in filter-tree.ts: (1) dateMs (L241-245) re-parses constant filterValue via new Date(String(v)) per row + extra startOfDay Date alloc at day precision, used at L260/268/284-287/291-292; (2) getOperatorSpecLoose (L114-120) linear-scans the registry per isConditionComplete call, and evaluateTree (L167/176/183) re-runs children.filter(isConditionComplete)+map per row; (3) is_relative (L295-303) recomputes relativeKeyToRange (3-11 Date allocs) per row; (4) text ops re-lowercase filterValue per row. Mechanism confirmed at consumer level: data-table.stories.tsx:1091/1857 wires evaluateTree as globalFilterFn, and TanStack source (getFilteredRowModel.ts L108-126) shows it fires once per globally-filterable column per row with break-on-first-truthy — failing rows re-evaluate the whole tree C× (an amplifier the finding missed). Re-eval per interaction is live: panel onChange={setFilterTree} (stories L1009) and value Input fires per keystroke. However quantification is overstated: OPERATOR_REGISTRY has 51 entries (rg count), not 「百餘」, so 150萬 comparisons is ~2x high (~750k); and the 20-60ms estimate only materializes at ~10k rows × 3 date conditions — in-repo demos use ~15 rows (generateLargeData(15)) where the full pass is sub-millisecond. Real scale-dependent hot-path debt in a published npm component (fix = precompile per tree change), no correctness bug, invisible at demo scale → P2 not P1.

confirmed.title: RowDragHandle — SortableRowCtx 每 render 新 object 讓 layout effect 重掛 listener;setPos 無值比對每 scroll frame 必 re-render
confirmed.mechanism: 兩層疊加(enableRowDrag=true 時):(1) SourceRowProvider/MirrorRowProvider 的 ctxValue 每 render 造新 object(未 useMemo)→ RowDragHandle `useLayoutEffect deps [rowEl, ctx]` 在每次 row re-render(= 每次 DataTableInner render)都 teardown/重掛 MutationObserver + window scroll(capture)+ resize listener,×每個 visible primary row(~20-35 個);(2) update() 內 `setPos({ top, left, rowHovered })` 永遠新 object、無 prev 值比對 → 即使位置沒變也 re-render;捲動時每個 handle 的 window scroll listener 各自 rAF → 每 frame ~35 handles × 2 getBoundingClientRect(row + table)+ 35 次 setState/re-render(Button + Tooltip + portal),疊在 virtualizer 本身的 range-change render 之上,約 3-10ms/frame 額外成本。
confirmed.suggestion: (a) setPos 前比對:`setPos(prev => prev && prev.top === top && prev.left === left && prev.rowHovered === rowHovered ? prev : { top, left, rowHovered })` — React 對相同 reference bail out,scroll 中位置變才 render;(b) SourceRowProvider/MirrorRowProvider ctxValue 用 useMemo(deps:setRefs/isDragging/invalidDrop/handle listeners 等)或 RowDragHandle effect deps 收斂為 `[rowEl, ctx?.role]` + 用 ref 讀最新 ctx,消掉每 render 的 observer/listener churn。

verdict.reason: Verified in data-table.tsx: (1) ctxValue at 498-514 (SourceRowProvider) and 542-554 (MirrorRowProvider) are un-memoized object literals rebuilt every render; (2) RowDragHandle useLayoutEffect (652-701) deps [rowEl, ctx] means every DataTableInner render (virtualizer range change during scroll, hover, drag state — no React.memo anywhere in the file, rows rendered via per-render rowEl closure) tears down and re-creates MutationObserver + window scroll(capture) + resize listeners per visible handle, plus a synchronous update() with 2 getBoundingClientRect; (3) setPos (667-671) always new object with no prev comparison, and the capture-phase window scroll listener does catch inner center-body scroll → per frame each of ~20-35 handles (showDragHandle at 2227, rendered at 2291; default height 400px + overscan 5 ≈ 20) runs rAF → 2 rect reads + setState → re-render of portal'd Button/Tooltip. Mechanism confirmed, slightly understated (remount path adds extra rect reads). Caveats: only when enableRowDrag=true (opt-in), and during vertical scroll positions genuinely change so a prev-value compare alone would not eliminate those re-renders (the fix needs a shared scroll manager / memoized ctx). 3-10ms/frame recurring scroll cost is plausible but not user-blocking on modern hardware → P2, matching claimed impact.

confirmed.title: 拖曳 / spreadsheet 互動 state 全放 DataTableInner root — dropIndicator 每次跨 row 觸發全表重渲
confirmed.mechanism: dropIndicator({id, side, type})、activeDragId、selectedCellId、rangeAnchor/rangeFocus 全是 DataTableInner root state。drag 中每次 over 變更(跨過一個 row)→ setDropIndicator 新 object → 整個 DataTableInner 重渲 = 全部 visible rows + cells + header 重建(finding 1 memo 已死 → Field subtree 全重渲);實際只有舊/新 target 兩個 row 需要知道 indicator 變化。spreadsheet mode 每次 arrow-key 移動 / click 同樣全表重渲一次。另 MirrorRowProvider 用 useDndContext() 訂閱整個 dnd context → pinned region 全部 mirror rows 在 drag 期間隨 over 變化額外重渲。單次全表 render 在寬表 + rich cells 可達 10-30ms,拖曳快速掃過多 rows 時可感頓挫。
confirmed.suggestion: 第一步(低成本):setDropIndicator 前 shallow compare(id/side/type 相同 → 保留 prev reference,React bail out),對齊檔內 invalidRef 既有 guard pattern;修 finding 1 memo 後全表 render 成本已大降。進一步(可選):dropIndicator 改 subscription 模型(ref + per-row useSyncExternalStore 或獨立細粒 context),只讓 target row 重渲 — 對齊 AG Grid row-level refresh idiom。

verdict.reason: Finding survives adversarial verification on all three axes. (1) file:line real: `dropIndicator` state at data-table.tsx:2132, `handleDragOver` → `setDropIndicator({id, side, type})` new object per over-change at 2789-2821, `selectedCellId`/`rangeAnchor`/`rangeFocus` at 862-864, `activeDragId` at 1408 — all confirmed root state of `DataTableInner` (single ~2150-line component, 819→2976, exported as forwardRef at 2976). (2) Mechanism correct: rows and headers render via inline closures inside DataTableInner (`rowEl` at 2204, `renderHeaderRow` at 2137) that read `dropIndicator` directly (2157, 2293, 2302); zero `React.memo` in data-table.tsx, so every setState at root rebuilds header + all visible rows + cells. The only memo boundary (`CellWithSurface`, cell-registry.tsx:510) is confirmed dead: data-table.tsx:1347 passes `meta={meta ?? {}}` (fresh object) and 1353-1356 pass fresh inline arrows (`onCommit`/`onCommitLive`/`onRequestEdit`) every render → shallow compare fails → Field subtrees re-render, corroborating the "finding 1 memo 已死" dependency. dnd-kit fires onDragOver per over-target change, so each row crossed = 1 full-table re-render (repeated `setDropIndicator(null)` bails out via Object.is, but crossings always produce a new object). Spreadsheet claim verified: `setSelectedCellId` fires on click (1524) and arrow-key move (1854-1870) → full re-render per keystroke. MirrorRowProvider claim verified: line 540 `useDndContext()` subscribes mirror pinned rows to the whole dnd context (active/over/collisions churn during drag). (3) Impact plausible, not noise: full rebuild of header + all visible rows × cells with dead memo means each cell re-runs FieldSurfaceProvider + Field naked-display subtree; 10-30ms per render on wide+rich tables is credible and repeats per row crossed during fast drag → dropped frames. Downgrade consideration: enableRowDrag/enableColumnReorder/spreadsheetMode all default false (833/837/841) so only opt-in consumers hit it, and it is interaction jank not correctness — hence P1 rather than P0.

confirmed.title: Dep array hygiene 三處:tableKeyboardHandler 漏 canEditCell、onColumnResize 文件說 commit-on-pointerup 實作卻 live fire、reorderableColumnIds 漏 columnVisibility
confirmed.mechanism: (a) tableKeyboardHandler 內部呼 canEditCell(L1851)但 deps 列的是 isCellEditable(L1893)— 目前 canEditCell identity stable([] deps chain)無實害,但未來 canEditCell deps 變動時會成 stale closure 地雷;(b) onColumnResize useEffect 觀測 columnSizing state,而 columnResizeMode='onChange'(L1044)→ 拖 resize 期間每 mousemove columnSizing 變一次 → callback 每 move fire 一次,與 prop docblock「commit-on-pointerup,非 live」(L221)矛盾 — consumer 若在 callback 寫 localStorage/URL/API 會每 mousemove 觸發 I/O;(c) reorderableColumnIds useMemo 讀 `table.getVisibleLeafColumns()`(live)但 deps 只列 table/columnsWithSelection/columnOrder,columnVisibility 切換後 memo 不重算 → ref 內 reorderable 清單 stale(隱藏欄仍在列表,影響 drop side 計算正確性多於 perf)。
confirmed.suggestion: (a) deps 補 canEditCell(或移除 isCellEditable 改列 canEditCell);(b) 二擇一對齊:pointerup 才 fire(在 effect 內偵測 isResizing false→true→false transition 或 header.getResizeHandler 包 commit)符合 docblock,或改 docblock 明寫 live-fire + 提醒 consumer 自行 debounce;(c) deps 補 columnVisibility(或直接依 table.getState().columnVisibility)。

verdict.reason: 2 of 3 sub-claims verified with real impact, 1 verified but harmless. (a) L1851 canEditCell vs L1893 isCellEditable dep mismatch exists, but canEditCell is identity-stable ([] dep chain via isCellEditable+isCellDisabled) — lint hygiene only, no runtime effect, noise alone. (b) VERIFIED REAL: docblock L221-224 promises commit-on-pointerup, but columnResizeMode:'onChange' (L1044) + useEffect L1050-1059 with no isResizingColumn gating fires onColumnResize per mousemove during drag; docblock explicitly tells consumers to do localStorage/URL/API persistence in this callback → doc-vs-implementation contract contradiction with consumer I/O-per-mousemove footgun (stories already setState per fire at data-table.stories.tsx:162/177). (c) VERIFIED REAL: reorderableColumnIds memo L2837-2846 reads live table.getVisibleLeafColumns() but deps [table(stable TanStack instance), columnsWithSelection(memo on [dsProcessedColumns,enabled]), columnOrder] omit columnVisibility (in table state L1012); visibility toggle → memo stale → reorderableColumnIdsRef (L2848) feeds stale list (hidden columns included) into column-drag drop-side calc — correctness edge case. Not P1: DS-internal cost trivial (table re-renders during drag anyway), (b) harm requires consumer heavy I/O, (c) requires hide-then-drag sequence.

confirmed.title: PeoplePicker hooks 排在 4 個 early return 之後 — mode/型態切換時 hook 數量變動 → React #310 crash
confirmed.fileLine: packages/design-system/src/components/PeoplePicker/people-picker.tsx:306-343(early returns 在 :146 display / :175 readonly+disabled / :212 single / :245 pill)
confirmed.mechanism: multi-stack 專用的 4 個 hooks(useRef :306、useState :307、useLayoutEffect :308、useCallback mergedStackRef :339)宣告在 display/readonly/single/pill 四個 early return 之後。同一 mounted instance 的 resolvedMode 在 edit↔display/disabled 間切換(本 branch 剛 ship 的 <Field disabled>/<Field mode> cascade 正是讓 resolvedMode 於 runtime 翻轉的機制)、或 value array↔single、multiDisplay stack↔pill 切換時,hook 呼叫數 7 → 11 變動,直接觸發 React error #310「Rendered fewer/more hooks」crash。同款 bug 已在 4 個 sibling 修過並留註解:select.tsx:503-506、combobox.tsx:584-588 + 685-691、link-input.tsx:114-116(明文 cite「beta.76 Combobox 同款修法」)— PeoplePicker 是 M10 掃描漏網。這不是 throughput 卡頓而是 render-correctness 白屏,故列 P0。
confirmed.suggestion: 把 stackContainerRef / stackVisibleCount / useLayoutEffect / mergedStackRef 四個 hooks 全部 hoist 到第一個 early return(:146)之前(對齊 select.tsx:503「所有 hooks 必在任何 early return 前 call」canonical);useLayoutEffect body 開頭加 guard `if (resolvedMode !== 'edit' || !isMulti || multiDisplay !== 'stack') { setStackVisibleCount(undefined); return }`(deps 補 resolvedMode / multiDisplay)。非 stack path 多算無害,同 combobox.tsx:685 hoist pattern。修完 storybook 手動切 <Field disabled> toggle 驗證不炸。

verdict.reason: Verified against pre-fix tree (git show e65714c4~1): the 4 multi-stack hooks (useRef/useState/useLayoutEffect/useCallback) were declared after the 4 early returns (display :146 / readonly+disabled :175 / single :212 / pill :245), matching the cited lines. Mechanism confirmed: resolvedMode comes from useResolvedFieldMode reading Field context (:137), so <Field disabled>/<Field mode> cascade flips it at runtime on the same mounted instance (no remount); isMulti (value array↔single) and multiDisplay flips do the same — hook call count then changes between renders → React #310 is a thrown Error (white screen), not a perf issue. Sibling precedent verified in current tree: select.tsx:503-506 documents the identical bug as actually triggered in production ("disabled→edit 切換 hook count 變動 → React 死亡, K13 觸發"), combobox.tsx:584-588 and link-input.tsx:114-116 (cites beta.76 Combobox 同款修法) carry the same-family fix comments — PeoplePicker was a genuine M10 scan miss. Minor nit: the exact 7→11 hook tally is approximate (custom hooks' internal hook counts untallied), but the direction (count differs across branches) is what triggers #310, so the core claim stands. Note: fix already landed at HEAD in commit e65714c4 (2026-07-05, "PeoplePicker P0 crash 家族 ×2") — hooks now hoisted to :154-:190 before the first early return at :196 with mode/stack guards; finding is real and correctly diagnosed, current tree no longer exhibits it.

confirmed.title: MultiPersonDisplay hooks 排在 empty early return 之後 — 同款 React #310 潛伏(目前僅靠 consumer 分流偶然遮蔽)
confirmed.mechanism: `if (!value || value.length === 0) return <span>` 在 useRef(:189)/useState(:190)/useLayoutEffect(:191)之前;value 於同一 mounted instance 非空↔空切換時 hook 數量 0↔3 變動 → React #310。目前 DS 內部 consumer(people-picker.tsx:148-150/:161-165/:186-190、cell-registry.tsx:389 `?? []`)都在 parent 層用 isEmpty 三元切換 element type(span vs MultiPersonDisplay → unmount 重掛)偶然避開;但 MultiPersonDisplay 是 person-display.tsx:359 具名 export 的公開 API,任何直接持續傳 value=[]↔[a] 的 consumer 都會炸,且「靠 parent 分流保護」不是契約,重構 parent 即引爆。
confirmed.suggestion: 同 F1 修法:三個 hooks hoist 到 :182 empty return 之前;useLayoutEffect body 現有 `if (!measured) return` 擴為 `if (!measured || !value || value.length === 0) return`。與 people-picker.tsx 修復同 commit,一併 /scan-similar-bugs 掃 DS-wide「hooks after early-return」pattern 收尾。

verdict.reason: Confirmed against the audited revision (e65714c4~1): early return at person-display.tsx:182 preceded useRef/useState/useLayoutEffect at :189-208, so a mounted MultiPersonDisplay receiving value []↔[a] flips hook count 0↔3 → React #310 crash (mechanism verified: React throws on inter-render hook-count change of the same instance). Masking claims also verified: people-picker.tsx's three isEmpty ternaries switch element type (span vs MultiPersonDisplay = remount, resetting hooks) and cell-registry MultiPersonCell's `?? []` routes through that same masked path — so no DS-internal path fires today, but MultiPersonDisplay is a named public export (person-display.tsx:359) with no contractual protection. Crash-class latent bug, not a ms-level perf item → P1 (not P0: no currently-firing consumer; not noise: crash, not timing). NOTE: already fixed at HEAD in commit e65714c4 (2026-07-05) — hooks hoisted above the early return + effect guard extended; finding is confirmed-and-remediated, no further action needed.

confirmed.title: TimePicker formatTime 每 call 新建 Intl.DateTimeFormat(無 cache);DatePicker 傳 locale/formatOptions 時同病 — DataTable date 欄有轉發此 config
confirmed.mechanism: `new Intl.DateTimeFormat(locale, formatOptions)` 是標準庫最貴 constructor 之一(locale data resolution,~0.1-1ms/次)。TimePicker formatTime 無 cheap path,display/readonly/edit 每 render 必建 1-3 次;DatePicker 只在 consumer 傳 formatOptions/locale 時走 Intl(:44-46,預設手組字串 OK),range 一次 render 最多 6 call(:772-894)。cell-registry 轉發 `meta?.formatOptions/locale` 進 DatePicker cells → 設了 locale 的 date 欄,50 可見 cell × 每次表格 re-render(sort/selection/scroll)× 0.2-0.5ms 可跨 10ms。世界級對照(MUI X / Ant / date-fns)一律 cache formatter。
confirmed.suggestion: date-picker.tsx / time-picker.tsx module level 加 formatter cache:`const dtfCache = new Map<string, Intl.DateTimeFormat>()`,key = locale + '|' + JSON.stringify(formatOptions),cache miss 才 new(DateTimeFormat 實例無狀態可重用)。兩檔各 1 處改,行為 Δ=0。

verdict.reason: Pattern verified at all cited lines: time-picker.tsx:79 uncached `new Intl.DateTimeFormat` in formatTime (call sites :244/:252/:279/:298, 1 per render — claimed 1-3 slightly overstated since mode branches are mutually exclusive); date-picker.tsx:45-46 conditional Intl path confirmed (single :414-415 = 2 calls/render, range = max 4 not 6 — :869-873/:890-894 are alternative branches); cell-registry.tsx:241-242/:274-275 forwarding confirmed, and TimeCell (:268-277) is worse than claimed since TimePicker has no cheap path even without locale. Re-render mechanism holds: CellWithSurface React.memo (cell-registry.tsx:510) is defeated by inline closures at data-table.tsx:1353-1356 (onCommit/onRequestEdit new refs every render) and no row-level memo exists, so all visible cells re-render on every sort/selection/scroll state change. BUT impact magnitude refuted by benchmark: warm ctor+format = 28µs/call in V8 (not claimed 0.2-0.5ms; V8 internally caches locale data — zh-TW long format also 28µs), so 50 visible cells ≈ 1.4ms and even 150 cells ≈ 4.2ms per re-render — the '可跨 10ms' claim fails on desktop. Not pure noise though: it recurs every re-render frame during continuous scroll (cumulative ~85-250ms/s of wasted main-thread), time columns hit unconditionally, and fix is the trivial standard idiom (module-level formatter cache per MDN/MUI/Ant). Downgrade to P2.

confirmed.title: useIsTouchDevice 初值固定 false — 觸控裝置上每個 Select/Combobox/PeoplePicker 先掛 Custom(desktop)整棵樹再換 Native,double-mount
confirmed.mechanism: `useState(false)` + useEffect 掛載後才 setIsMobile(mq.matches):桌機 false→false React bail-out 無害;觸控裝置首次 commit 先渲 CustomSelect/CustomCombobox(含 SelectMenu/Popover/cmdk subtree),effect 後 flip true → 換 NativeSelect/NativeCombobox → 舊 subtree 全 unmount + 新樹 mount。每 instance 付一次「白掛 desktop 樹」mount/unmount;表單頁 10+ Field 控件時觸控首屏多做一整輪無效 mount。
confirmed.suggestion: 改 lazy initializer 同步讀 media query:`useState(() => typeof window !== 'undefined' && window.matchMedia('(pointer: coarse)').matches)` — 首次 render 即正確分支,不再 mount-then-swap;effect 保留 change listener 不變。

verdict.reason: Pattern verified: use-is-touch-device.ts:10 useState(false) + effect-only flip; select.tsx:667/combobox.tsx:852 branch Native-vs-Custom at same position, so touch devices genuinely double-mount (Custom mounts, effect flips, full unmount → Native mount; PeoplePicker inherits via Combobox). However the claimed magnitude is overstated: SelectMenu renders options inside Radix PopoverContent with no forceMount (popover.tsx:53-77) and open starts closed (select.tsx:493), so the cmdk/Popover subtree NEVER mounts during the wasted pass — only the trigger subtree (styled div + icons + cva) is thrown away. Wasted cost ≈ one trigger mount/unmount + one extra commit per instance (~0.1-0.5ms desktop, ~1-2ms low-end mobile); a 10-field form on touch ≈ 5-15ms once at first paint. Real but small and one-time; trivially fixable with lazy useState initializer (Vite SPA, no SSR risk).

confirmed.title: (d) 回答:ResizeHandle primitive 本身零 drag 成本;現存唯一 drag-resize(DataTable,primitive Phase 2 計畫吸收對象)每 mousemove 全表重渲
confirmed.mechanism: ResizeHandle primitive 無 state、無 mousemove listener,drag math 明文 consumer-owned,且目前 0 production drag consumer(data-table.tsx 先前 grep 命中是 `getResizeHandler` 子字串,DataTable 實際仍手刻 span 未 migrate)→ primitive 端無「每 mousemove setState」問題。但 (d) 的實質答案在唯一 live 實作:DataTable 用 TanStack `columnResizeMode: 'onChange'` + uncontrolled columnSizing → drag 中每個 pointermove 觸發 table state 更新 → DataTable host 整體重渲(header + virtual window 全部可見 rows × columns 的 flexRender),檔內無 React.memo、無 resize 期間 body 凍結、無 CSS-var 寬度間接層(grep 證實)。窄表無感;寬表 + rich cell(每 frame render > 16ms)時 drag 掉幀可感 — TanStack 官方 perf 指南即為此場景建議 memo body / CSS variables。註:DataTable 在本 finder 的 scope 外,列出供 orchestrator 與 DataTable 線 dedupe。
confirmed.suggestion: Phase 2 ResizeHandle migrate DataTable 時一併做 TanStack canonical 二選一:(a)column widths 寫成容器 CSS vars(--col-<id>-size),cell 消費 var,resize 中只改 style 不重渲 body;或 (b)以 `table.getState().columnSizingInfo.isResizingColumn` 為訊號,resize 期間 body 走 React.memo 凍結(此處 memo 三條件成立:child 貴 + parent 每 mousemove render + props 可凍結)。

verdict.reason: 全部宣稱經 read + grep 驗證成立:(1) ResizeHandle primitive(resize-handle.tsx:104-188)確為 stateless forwardRef span,零 useState/useEffect/addEventListener,drag math 檔頭明文 consumer-owned,Phase 2 尚未 migrate — 「primitive 零 drag 成本」正確;(2)「0 production drag consumer」正確 — DS-wide rg 只命中 primitive 自家 stories/spec,data-table.tsx 命中確為 getResizeHandler 子字串(含 ResizeHandle)非 import;(3) data-table.tsx:1044 columnResizeMode:'onChange' + 2081-2088 手刻 span handle 屬實;(4) 重渲機制正確 — 全檔 3001 行零 React.memo、零 CSS-var 寬度間接層(寬度走 col.getSize() 直接進 render path),TanStack uncontrolled columnSizing 每 pointermove 更新 → host 整體重渲 → header + virtual window 可見 rows × columns flexRender 全重跑;1047-1059 useEffect 觀測 columnSizing 佐證每 move 有 state change。Impact 校正為 P2:機制真實且 TanStack 官方 perf 指南正是此場景,但僅 drag 期間 transient、virtualization 已 bound 行數、窄表無感、歷史 user 回報是反方向('onEnd' 太頓才改 'onChange'),寬表 + rich cell 才掉幀可感,非 P1 也非 noise。

confirmed.title: 500-item DropdownMenu/SelectMenu 開啟時全量 mount,無虛擬化也無 scale 上限文檔
confirmed.mechanism: overlay open 時 Radix Presence 一次 commit 全部 children:500 × (Radix Item + MenuItem 3-5 層 div + ItemContent);checkbox 模式每 row 再各 mount 一個 DS Checkbox(= Radix CheckboxPrimitive,stateful component + context),avatar 模式每 row 一個 Avatar(含 img fallback state)。合計約 2000-3000 DOM node + 數百個 stateful component 單次 mount,中階硬體開啟延遲可達 50-150ms 級,吃掉 150ms 開啟動畫預算 → 可感頓挫。maxHeight + ScrollArea(dropdown-menu.tsx:156-161)只裁「視覺 viewport」,不裁 mount 數量 — 500 item 仍全部 render。grep 全 scope 無 forceMount,lazy-on-open 已是預設,所以成本全集中在 open 那一刻。
confirmed.suggestion: 兩段式:(1) AUTO 可做 — 在 dropdown-menu.spec.md / select-menu.spec.md 補 scale guidance(對齊 Ant Select / MUI Autocomplete 皆在約 >100 options 建議 windowing);(2) 若產品真有 500-item 場景 → SelectMenu 引入 windowing(rc-virtual-list 類)是 SSOT-affecting API 決策,需提案給 user 拍板,不 auto 動。

verdict.reason: 機制全數驗證成立:select-menu.tsx:359-388 全量 map 每 option 一個 cmdk CommandItem + MenuItem;MenuItem(menu-item.tsx:129)無 React.memo,checkbox 模式(:215)每 row mount Radix CheckboxPrimitive(含 useFieldContext/useContext/useId,checkbox.tsx:155-163,253),avatar 模式每 row Avatar 含 useState(imgError)(avatar.tsx:147);dropdown-menu.tsx:156-161 ScrollArea+maxHeight 只裁視覺 viewport 不裁 mount;全 scope 無 forceMount(lazy-on-open 屬實,成本集中 open 一刻);DS 僅 DataTable 有虛擬化(VIRTUAL_THRESHOLD=30 先例),SelectMenu/DropdownMenu 無。500 item 時 2000-3000 DOM node + 數百 stateful mount、中階硬體 50-150ms 開啟延遲估算合理,且 spec 自己引導的場景(國家/時區選擇 select.spec.md:138 約 250-400 項)會真實踩到。惟一子宣稱被部分推翻:「無 scale 上限文檔」不完全準確 — select.spec.md:284 已明文「大量選項…無分頁/虛擬捲動——長清單開 searchable」,即已文檔化無虛擬捲動的事實(但無數字上限/效能警語,searchable 也不減 initial mount)。降為 P2 理由:一次性 open 成本非持續 jank;DropdownMenu action menu 現實不會 500 項;Radix/shadcn/cmdk 生態同樣不虛擬化;repo 內無現行 500-item consumer 實證。

confirmed.title: TreeView 單一 context 收納高頻 drag/focus state — 拖曳中每個 pointermove 造成全樹 TreeItem re-render
confirmed.mechanism: handleDragOver(tree-view.tsx:324-404)在每個 dnd-kit dragOver 事件(≈每次 pointermove)呼叫 setDropTarget({id, position, depth})— 新 object identity、無欄位相等 bail-out(:393),即使 drop target 完全沒變也觸發 state update → contextValue useMemo(:465-506)重建 → 所有 TreeItem 經 useTreeView()(:779-798)消費整包 context 全數 re-render。每個 TreeItem render 含 useDraggable+useDroppable(dnd-kit 拖曳期間本身已在 re-render)、6+ 次 cn() 組合、chevron/prefix/suffix slot 重建。同一 root cause 的第二路徑:鍵盤導覽 ArrowUp/Down 每按一次 setFocusedId → 同樣全樹 re-render(focusedId 也在同一 context,:498)。50 節點以下無感;200-500 節點(檔案總管場景)拖曳時每 mousemove 全樹 render 可吃掉大半 frame budget,鍵盤快速上下移每鍵 10ms+。
confirmed.suggestion: 第一步(低風險高收益):setDropTarget 改 functional update 加 bail-out — prev && prev.id===nextId && prev.position===position && prev.depth===finalDepth 時回傳 prev,把 context churn 從「每 mousemove」降到「target 實際改變時」;draggingId/focusedId 的 setState React 已自帶 Object.is bail-out 不用改。第二步(規模化才做):把 context 拆 static(size/context/selectionMode/draggable/callbacks/registry — 幾乎不變)與 dynamic(expandedIds/selectedIds/focusedId/draggingId/dropTarget)兩層,讓 render 變薄;真正 per-node subscription(registry + useSyncExternalStore)屬重構,先不建議。

verdict.reason: 部分成立、核心機制被推翻。成立面:tree-view.tsx:393 setDropTarget 確為新 object 無 bail-out;:465-506 contextValue 同時收 dropTarget(:475)+ focusedId(:478);TreeItem(:779-798)整包消費 context 且無 React.memo → context 變 = 全部可見 TreeItem re-render;鍵盤路徑真實(ArrowUp/Down :542/:548 setFocusedId → 每鍵全樹 re-render)。推翻面(finding 主標題):(1) handleDragOver 綁在 onDragOver(:644)非 onDragMove,而 dnd-kit 源碼(node_modules/@dnd-kit/core/dist/core.esm.js ~:3285)該 effect deps 為 [overId] — 只在跨 row(over 變更)時 fire,非每次 pointermove;頻率被高估約一個量級。(2) 非拖曳中 item 的 transform 走 NullContext(:3411),pointermove 本來就不會全樹 render。(3) 拖曳路徑的邊際成本歸因錯誤:dnd-kit InternalContext 本身含 over(:3336-3350),useDraggable/useDroppable 全消費它 → 每次 over 變更 dnd-kit 自己就讓全部 TreeItem re-render,且與 setDropTarget 同一個 unstable_batchedUpdates render pass — 拆 TreeView context 也消不掉拖曳期全樹 render。殘餘可行動問題 = focusedId 收在單一 context 的鍵盤路徑:典型 <100 可見節點約 1-5ms(noise 級),200-500 節點檔案總管場景才可能 >10ms/鍵。真實但僅大樹才顯現、且拖曳半條路徑是 dnd-kit 固有行為 → P2。

confirmed.title: Calendar 每次 render 對每個 cell 全掃 events — O(42 cells × N events) 且每次比較配 ~5 個 new Date() 配置
confirmed.mechanism: cell 迴圈內每格呼叫 eventsOnDate(events, date)(:298),而 eventsOnDate(:117-127)對全部 events 跑 filter,每個 event 每格做 coerceDate×2 + new Date()×3(共 ~5 個 Date 物件配置)。月格 42 cells × 500 events = 21,000 次 filter + ~10 萬個 Date 配置,每次 render 都重算(無 useMemo)— 不只換月,父層任何 state 造成的 re-render 也全額重付;之後每格還 slice().sort()。另外 monthTitle 的 new Intl.DateTimeFormat(:189-192)每 render 重建(Intl 建構是已知貴的 ~0.1-1ms),未如 weekdayNames 一樣 memo。數十 events 內是噪音;數百-上千 events(行事曆真實規模)單次 render 可達數十 ms,可感。
confirmed.suggestion: 用 useMemo([events, days]) 一次 bucketing:走一遍 events,依 [start..end] 展開寫入 Map<'yyyy-MM-dd', CalendarEvent[]>(每 event 只 parse Date 一次),bucketing 時順便完成 allDay 排序;cell 內改 map.get(key) ?? []。monthTitle 的 Intl.DateTimeFormat 用 useMemo([locale]) 快取 formatter(對齊 weekdayNames 既有做法)。

verdict.reason: 全部驗證屬實:(1) calendar.tsx:298 確在 cell 迴圈內每格呼叫 eventsOnDate(events, date).slice().sort(),eventsOnDate(:117-127) 對全 events filter,每 event-cell 對 coerceDate×2 + new Date()×3(cell 的 d 也未 hoist、每 event 重算);(2) 機制正確 — 無 useMemo(days 有 memo 但 per-cell events 計算 inline),Calendar 只有 forwardRef 無 React.memo,父層任何 re-render 全額重付;monthTitle Intl.DateTimeFormat(:189-192)每 render 重建屬實(實測 ~0.107ms/次,weekdayNames 有 memo 形成對照);(3) Node 實測同邏輯 42-cell 掃描:100 events=2.1ms(噪音)、500 ISO-string events=11.1ms、1000=22.7ms、500 Date-obj=4.8ms — 未含 React reconcile。500-1000 events(元件 spec 自述對標 Google Calendar page-level canvas,屬真實規模)單次 render 超過 16ms frame budget 且每次 re-render 重付,「數十 ms 可感」在 1000 events 屬實、500 略樂觀但方向正確。唯一小偏差:consumer 傳 Date 物件時配置降為 3 個/次(~5 是 ISO-string 主格式下的合理上界)。修法直觀:useMemo + O(N) 單趟 bucket 成 date→events Map。典型 story 規模是噪音、真實規模可感 → P2。

confirmed.title: FileViewer wheel-zoom 熱路徑:每個 wheel tick 把 zoom state 提升到 shell → Toolbar+Filmstrip+InfoPanel 全 chrome re-render
confirmed.mechanism: ImageRenderer handleTransformed(image-renderer.tsx:184-194)在使用者 wheel/pinch 縮放時每 tick 呼叫 onZoomChange → shell setZoom(:801)→ 整個 FileViewer subtree re-render:Toolbar(6 個 Button 各含 Tooltip wrapper + cva/cn)、ZoomInput(zoom 變 → useEffect setDraft 再多一輪 render,file-viewer.tsx:192-194)、Filmstrip(N 個 thumb 各跑 cn + buildFadeMask)、InfoPanel(若開啟)。trackpad wheel 事件可達 60Hz+,每 tick ~1-3ms chrome render,多檔 filmstrip(20+ thumbs)時在低階機器可感卡頓。對照:pan(拖移)已正確 — scale 不變時 handleTransformed 不 setState,react-zoom-pan-pinch 純 CSS transform,零 React render。附帶:zoom round 誤差恰為 0.005 時(:164 用 < 0.005)會誤觸 centerView 200ms programmatic 動畫跟使用者手勢打架,建議一併放寬為 <= 0.005 或 0.006。
confirmed.suggestion: 三條件成立(child 貴 + parent 高頻 render + props 可穩定),對 Filmstrip 與 InfoPanel 上 React.memo:Filmstrip props(files/activeIndex/onSelect=setIndex useCallback/labels useMemo)已穩定,直接 memo 即生效;InfoPanel 需先把 onClose={() => setInfoOpen(false)} 與 Toolbar 的 onInfoToggle 抽成 useCallback。Toolbar 因消費 zoom 必然重繪,保持現狀可接受(單一 header row 夠薄)。

verdict.reason: Every claim verified against source. (1) file-viewer.tsx:801 has shell-owned `const [zoom, setZoom] = useState(100)`; :1024 passes `onZoomChange={setZoom}` to the renderer. (2) image-renderer.tsx:184-194 handleTransformed (wired to onTransform :221) calls onZoomChange(Math.round(scale*100)) on every user wheel/pinch tick where rounded pct changes; wheel step 0.03 (~3%/tick) means essentially every tick. (3) Zero React.memo in file-viewer.tsx (grep confirmed); Toolbar/Filmstrip/InfoPanel/ZoomInput are plain React.FC rendered in shell body with inline-arrow callbacks, so every setZoom re-renders all chrome. (4) button.tsx:510-518 confirms iconOnly+aria-label Buttons auto-wrap Radix Tooltip (5 in toolbar + 2 nav arrows ≈ claimed 6). (5) ZoomInput :192-194 useEffect setDraft confirmed → extra render pass per zoom change. (6) Filmstrip :558 buildFadeMask + :605-645 per-thumb cn() re-run each tick. (7) Pan contrast accurate: scale unchanged → no setState → pure CSS transform. (8) The 0.005 edge at :164 is real: strict `<` with Math.round worst-case error exactly 0.005 → centerView(.,200) fires mid-gesture + programmaticZoomRef locks user sync 280ms; rare float edge but correct. Impact: per-tick chrome render 1-3ms is under the 10ms one-off noise bar, but this is a 60Hz+ recurring gesture hot path (6-18% frame budget wasted continuously), plausibly janky on low-end machines with 20+ filmstrip thumbs. Feature works and image transform stays CSS-smooth outside React, so not P0/P1 — genuine fixable inefficiency = P2.

confirmed.title: react-hook-form 漏列 rollup external,被整包 inline 進 published dist
confirmed.mechanism: packages/design-system/package.json:118 宣告 react-hook-form ^7.80.0 為 dependency,且 vite.config.ts external 陣列列了其他所有 runtime deps(radix/recharts/cmdk/sonner/date-fns…),唯獨缺 react-hook-form → Rollup 把它 inline 成 dist/node_modules/react-hook-form/dist/index.esm.js(實測 gzip 15.3KB;含 sourcemap 目錄 248KB,經 files:["dist"] 全數發佈)。field.tsx:541 re-export useFormValidation → 有用 useFormValidation 的 consumer 載入這份私有 copy 而非 npm 安裝的那份:(a) consumer app 自己也用 react-hook-form 時 = 雙份 copy,bundle 白付 ~15KB gz;(b) package.json 宣告的 dependency 變成裝了沒人 import 的 dead weight;(c) react-hook-form 的 patch/security 更新被鎖死在 DS build 當下版本,要重發 DS 才吃得到。
confirmed.suggestion: vite.config.ts rollupOptions.external 加 'react-hook-form'(對齊其他 deps 的既有 pattern),rebuild 後驗證:dist/node_modules 目錄消失 + dist/components/Field/use-form-validation.js 的 import 改指裸名 'react-hook-form',再跑 npm run release:preflight(dogfood 驗 consumer 可 resolve)。

verdict.reason: Finding verified real, though already fixed in commit e65714c4. (1) Pre-fix state confirmed via git show e65714c4~1: external array listed all other runtime deps but omitted react-hook-form; current vite.config.ts:60 now lists it with a comment corroborating the exact finding (beta.80 inline, gzip 15.3KB + sourcemap). (2) Mechanism correct: package.json:98 declares react-hook-form ^7.80.0 as dependency; use-form-validation.ts:39 imports useForm; field.tsx:541 re-exports useFormValidation into the published surface; files includes "dist"; with preserveModules:true a non-external dep is emitted as dist/node_modules/react-hook-form/... exactly as claimed. Post-fix rebuilt dist now has bare external import, proving externalization was the missing piece. (3) Impact: no runtime breakage and no dual-instance identity bug (DS fully wraps RHF, never exposes RHF objects across the boundary), so not P0; but ~15KB gz duplicate for consumers also using RHF, dead-weight declared dependency, published tarball bloat, and security-patch lock-in on a shipped library = P1, not P2/noise. Minor inaccuracy: dependency is at package.json line 98, not 118 — substance unaffected.

confirmed.title: FileViewer(rare-use overlay)靜態 import image-renderer → react-zoom-pan-pinch 在 viewer 從未打開時也進 consumer bundle
confirmed.mechanism: FileViewer 是 modal overlay(多數 session 不開),但 file-viewer.tsx 頂層靜態 `import { ImageRenderer, canRenderImage } from './image-renderer'`,而 image-renderer.tsx 頂層 import react-zoom-pan-pinch(已 externalize)→ consumer 任何 route 只要 import FileViewer,最終 bundle 即含 react-zoom-pan-pinch(約 12KB gz)+ ImageRenderer 本體,無論 user 是否打開過 viewer。其餘 overlay(Dialog/Sheet/Coachmark)皆 Radix 薄殼、無同級重依賴,不需 lazy。
confirmed.suggestion: 把 canRenderImage(純 util,開啟前判斷用)拆到獨立小 module 保持同步呼叫;ImageRenderer 改 `React.lazy(() => import('./image-renderer'))`,open 時以既有 loading state 當 Suspense fallback。備選成本更低:既有 subpath exports(./components/FileViewer)已讓 consumer 可自行 React.lazy 整個 FileViewer,先在 spec/README 文件化該 pattern 即可;只在 consumer 冷路徑常載 FileViewer 時才值得動 DS 內部。

verdict.reason: All claims verified by reading source: (1) file-viewer.tsx:44 static import of ImageRenderer/canRenderImage exists; (2) image-renderer.tsx:2-7 top-level react-zoom-pan-pinch import exists; (3) mechanism is even stronger than claimed — file-viewer.tsx:105-115 registers ImageRenderer in a module-singleton registry at module-eval time (side effect), so tree-shaking cannot drop it; any consumer importing FileViewer ships react-zoom-pan-pinch whether or not the modal ever opens; (4) externalization confirmed (vite.config.ts:61 + package.json dependencies ^4.0.3) meaning the lib lands in the consumer bundle via their bundler, exactly as claimed; (5) size claim conservative — measured dist/index.esm.js = 118.7KB raw / 22.2KB gzipped unminified (minified subset ~12-15KB gz), so "~12KB gz" is not inflated; (6) modal-fullscreen rare-use framing matches the component's own doc header. Attempted refutations (tree-shaking, externalization-means-free, size exaggeration) all failed. Impact: bundle-size cost paid before first open, deferrable via React.lazy on the renderer component (canRenderImage predicate at line 607 stays eager, trivially separable) — real but non-blocking optimization, P2 as originally rated.

confirmed.title: root package.json 兩個 dead dependencies:next-themes + @babel/runtime(含 stale external entry)
confirmed.mechanism: repo-wide grep(排除 node_modules/lockfile/sourcemap):next-themes 唯一引用是 DS vite.config.ts:58 的 external 條目(external 一個沒人 import 的套件 = no-op),零 code import;@babel/runtime 零引用。root 是 private playground 不進 published bundle(0KB shipped 影響),但增加 npm install 重量、lockfile 噪音,且 external 清單誤導後人以為 DS 依賴 next-themes。
confirmed.suggestion: 移除 package.json 的兩個 dependency + vite.config.ts:58 的 'next-themes' external 條目,`npm i` 更新 lockfile 後跑 build + build-storybook smoke 確認無 transitive 需求;若 @babel/runtime 當初是 security-audit pin,改用 lockfile overrides 而非 direct dependency。

verdict.reason: 部分成立、需砍半。next-themes 半邊完全驗證成立:file:line 屬實(package.json:90 + vite.config.ts:58),repo-wide grep 僅此 2 處、零 code import;npm ls 證實無其他套件依賴它(拔掉真的省 install);DS package.json 無 dep/peer 宣告 → external 條目確為 stale no-op(來源 = 2026-04-16 commit 300f07dc shadcn sonner scaffold 殘留)。但 @babel/runtime 半邊被推翻:(1) npm ls 顯示它是 @changesets/cli / polished / @testing-library/dom 的 transitive dep,拔 root entry 它照裝,「增加 install 重量」不成立;(2) git 歷史直接反證 — commit 9ab7353e 曾以 unused 拔除,commit 55ad5d56 明寫「Install @babel/runtime for Storybook build」重新加回(phantom-dependency workaround),再拔有重破 Storybook build 的實證風險,不可視為 dead。Impact 校正:0ms runtime / 0KB shipped(finding 自認),純 install/lockfile/可讀性 hygiene;僅 next-themes 兩行清理值得做,故降為 P2 維護級而非效能問題。

refuted.title: Header 全選 tri-state 計數 O(n) 每 render 未 memo
refuted.reason: Pattern verified real: data-table.tsx:1764-1769 computes visibleSelectedCount via selectableVisibleIds.filter(isSelectedId) in render body with no useMemo, inside the single DataTableInner component (lines 819-2975) which also owns all hot-path state (selectedCellId/rangeAnchor @862-864 spreadsheet nav, activeDragId @1408, dropIndicator @2132 drag-over, dragOverlayHtml @2735, useVirtualizer @1101 scroll range) — so every drag-over/keyboard-nav/scroll-range re-render re-runs the O(n) Set-lookup filter over all filtered rows (rows @1061 = table.getRowModel().rows, not virtual window). Mechanism 100% correct, and a useMemo would legitimately cache it on hot paths. However, measured cost (Node benchmark): 10k rows = 0.28ms per render, 100k rows = 3.0ms — both well under the 10ms noise threshold; the finding's own 0.5-2ms estimate was already sub-threshold and even that overestimates. Cost is zero when selection is disabled (empty array @1743). Correct code observation, negligible runtime impact → noise.

refuted.title: Avatar React.memo 被 inline `hoverCard={buildPersonProfileCard(p)}` 新 JSX 打穿 — 3 個 call site 繞過 PersonAvatar canonical,回退 2026-05-13 perf fix
refuted.reason: Pattern 與機制屬實但 impact 高估。屬實:3 個 call site 確在(people-picker.tsx:329 pill tagRenderer、:421 renderHiddenTag、person-display.tsx:265 hidden overflow tags)inline `hoverCard={buildPersonProfileCard(p)}`;avatar.tsx:363 確為 React.memo(AvatarInner);buildPersonProfileCard(person-display.tsx:61-81)每 call 回傳新 ProfileCard JSX + 新 noop closure → 新 object identity 必打穿 shallow compare,繞過 person-display.tsx:115-118 PersonAvatar useMemo canonical。但兩點推翻 impact:(1)「繞過 scroll-defer」在關鍵層不成立 — avatar.tsx:296 `if (!hoverCard || isTableScrolling) return baseEl` 是 Avatar 內部 guard,table scroll 期間 HoverCard wrapper(codex Layer C 認定的 dominant hotspot:Portal + useDocumentTheme subtree)無論 caller 都仍被 skip,逃過 defer 的只有 buildPersonProfileCard 的 JSX object allocation(微秒級);2026-05-13 fix 的真熱路徑(DataTable display cell 走 PersonAvatar)useMemo 完好,「回退 perf fix」言過其實。(2)熱度低:renderHiddenTag 與 hidden overflow tags 兩 site 只在 overflow popover 開啟時 mount(rare、user-initiated);最熱的 pill tagRenderer 是 keystroke-gated 非 scroll-frame-gated,memo bust 後每個 Avatar 重 reconcile 的只是 div/img + HoverCard trigger stub(closed 時 Radix content 不 mount),5-10 pills 單次 finding 自估 1-5ms < 10ms 門檻。修正為 noise(hygiene 級:改用 PersonAvatar 或 useMemo 是正確 SSOT 對齊,但非效能問題)。

refuted.title: options identity 每 render 重生 — PeoplePicker inline `people.map(personToSelectOption)` + Select filteredOptions 未 memo,下游整條 useMemo 鏈失效
refuted.reason: Pattern and mechanism verified: people-picker.tsx has inline `people.map(personToSelectOption)` in all 3 edit branches (actual lines :263/:296/:359, not the cited :217/:250/:350), which invalidates combobox.tsx:699-704 filteredOptions useMemo (options in deps) → :709-720 menuOptions → select-menu.tsx:197-250 selectableOptions/allState/showCreate/groupedOptions every render. select.tsx:515-517 filteredOptions is indeed unmemoized (new array per render when search non-empty), inconsistent with sister combobox. HOWEVER impact is noise: none of SelectMenu/Select/Combobox/PeoplePicker use React.memo, so the defeated useMemos never prevented any re-render — they only cache ~5 O(n) map/filter passes (µs at n=100, tens of µs at n=1000, 2-3 orders below the 10ms bar). No useEffect is keyed on options identity (no hidden measurement/scroll cost), row keys are string values (no remount churn), menu DOM only mounts while popover open, and PeoplePicker re-render triggers (ResizeObserver setState, parent renders) are low-frequency. Valid code-hygiene fix (hoist map to useMemo, memo select.tsx filteredOptions to match combobox) but no user-perceivable perf effect in realistic scenarios.

refuted.title: Sidebar 單一 context 粒度:activeId / open 任一變動 → 全部 useSidebar consumer 整樹重渲
refuted.reason: Pattern 與機制全部驗證屬實:L90 單一 SidebarContext、L208-222 contextValue useMemo 混裝 volatile(activeId/open/state/openMobile/isMobile)+ stable(size/setters),全檔零 React.memo、零 selector,故任一 setActiveId/toggle 都令全部 useSidebar consumer(L1008 button、L728 GroupLabel 只讀 size、L309 容器、L419 Trigger、L1215 Skeleton)重渲;collapse 視覺確為 CSS data-attribute、button 端只有 tooltip hidden 需要 state,宣稱無誤。但 impact 高估:repo 內最大 sidebar 約 23 個 button(stories)+ template app 小型 sidebar,無任何 100+ item consumer;典型 N≤40 單次 2-8ms 在 10ms 噪音線下,finding 自己也承認。「100+ 可達 10-30ms」是無實例外推;且此設計 = shadcn/ui sidebar 上游原封 canonical(業界 baseline),controlled(router-driven)模式下 parent 重渲本來就整樹重渲,context 粒度非邊際成本。真實存在但當前 codebase 規模下不可感 → noise(僅當未來出現 100+ item consumer 才值得升 P2 重評)。

refuted.title: SidebarProvider setOpen 以 open 為 dep → 每次 toggle 連鎖重建 callback + 重掛 window keydown listener
refuted.reason: Pattern verified at sidebar.tsx:172-183/185-189/191-203 — setOpen useCallback deps 確為 [setOpenProp, open](line 174 需 value(open)),每次 toggle 連鎖使 toggleSidebar 換 identity → useEffect([toggleSidebar]) 重掛 window keydown listener,機制宣稱全部正確。contextValue 宣稱也對:setter 換 identity 是 useMemo 變因之一,但 open/state 本身已變,consumer 重渲必然,無額外重渲(檔內無 React.memo child 可失效)。但影響量級:listener remove+add 為微秒級、僅在離散 user toggle 動作觸發(非 hot path、非 per-frame),遠低於 10ms 門檻;且此寫法逐字承襲 shadcn 上游。屬純 hygiene 觀察,非效能缺陷。

refuted.title: Breadcrumb declarative stable key 用 label 字串:同 label 同 role 的兩個 item → key 衝突
refuted.reason: Pattern verified at breadcrumb.tsx:210-211 and commit 8ad7e232 real, but the residual-harm claim is refuted on mechanism: (a) trigger window is pathological — with defaults (maxItems=4, before/after=1) a collision requires an exactly-4-item path with two CONSECUTIVE identical middle labels (the finding's own example「設定>專案>設定>一般」does NOT collide: first 設定 is role 'root' → key 'root-設定' vs 'middle-設定'); with 5+ items collapse leaves zero visible middles (collapsed items go into DropdownMenu keyed by index j, line 260); (b) the「TruncatedLabel truncation state / shared-RO 綁到錯的 DOM」claim is wrong — sharedROCallbacks is WeakMap<Element> keyed by the actual DOM node via each instance's ref (lines 24, 35-39, 43-54), not by React key, and check() recomputes scrollWidth>clientWidth from the live element (+RAF+100ms retry), so state self-corrects and cannot durably bind to wrong DOM; (c) colliding items have identical label strings by definition, so any mis-matched swap is between visually equivalent nodes; differing href/startIcon are props that re-render correctly regardless of key. Worst case = dev-only duplicate-key console warning + one sub-ms TruncatedLabel remount on a list that is static per page. Below the 10ms threshold → noise.

refuted.title: Tabs MenuTabsList:enhancedChildren 未 memo + registerItem(i) 每 render 產新 callback ref → 每次 commit 全 trigger ref detach/reattach + 元素重建
refuted.reason: Pattern and mechanism verified in source: tabs.tsx:262-268 registerItem is a stable useCallback whose per-index invocation returns a fresh closure each render; tabs.tsx:275-280 enhancedChildren maps cloneElement in render body without useMemo (while items IS memoized, so the gap is real). Every MenuTabsList commit therefore recreates all trigger elements with new callback refs → React runs oldRef(null)+newRef(el) per trigger (Map delete+set ×N) and re-renders all N triggers. Re-render sources confirmed: TabsValueContext (line 253), useScrollEdges state, parent renders. However impact is noise: useScrollEdges has a verified prev-equality bail (use-overflow-items.ts:77-81) so edge flips are low-frequency; tab switches re-render triggers anyway via Radix data-state; 「元素重建」is React-element-only (DOM nodes reused by reconciliation, no MutationObserver storm); total cost = ≤~20 lightweight vDOM re-renders + trivial Map ops per commit, far under 10ms. Real pattern, correct mechanism, hygiene-only impact.

refuted.title: MenuItem 每 render 跑 Object.entries(props).filter + Object.fromEntries — 是死計算(spread 順序已保證行為),純配置浪費
refuted.reason: Pattern 逐字驗證存在於 menu-item.tsx L207-209;機制正確 — JSX spread 後的顯式 onClick/onKeyDown(L208-209)必覆蓋 spread 同名 key,filter 為 100% 死計算(L205-206 comment 自己也記載此順序保證「行為不變」);MenuItem 無 React.memo(裸 forwardRef L129)且 SelectMenu 經 cmdk CommandItem 消費(select-menu.tsx L367-387),規模面宣稱成立。但 finding 自估 500-item 全量 pass 僅 0.15-0.5ms,遠低於 10ms 噪音門檻且自承無可感卡頓 — 依「10ms 以下 = noise」校準,效能 impact 應為 noise;P2 的支撐理由是 code hygiene 而非效能,不足以撐 P2。

refuted.title: ItemContent 每 render 重建 toneClass 4-key 查表物件(row primitive 熱路徑)
refuted.reason: Pattern verified real: item-anatomy.tsx:370-375 does build the 4-key toneClass object literal per ItemContent render; no React.memo exists in the file, and ItemContent is genuinely the Family 1+2 content hot path (MenuItem at menu-item.tsx:247 → DropdownMenu/SelectMenu/TreeView/Sidebar; plus FileItem/Notice/ProfileCard direct). Mechanism claims are accurate and honestly scoped — the object is a local lookup never passed as prop, so no memo-break or re-render amplification. However impact is overrated: 500 rows × ~10-50ns per 4-key allocation ≈ 5-25µs per render pass, ~3 orders of magnitude under the 10ms noise threshold; JIT escape analysis may eliminate the allocation entirely. This is a hoist-to-module-scope style hygiene note, not a measurable performance issue → noise, not P2.

refuted.title: DateGrid 在 render body 內定義 PreviousMonthButton/NextMonthButton — 每次 re-render 元件型別變新 → 兩顆 nav 按鈕(含 Tooltip subtree)強制 unmount/remount
refuted.reason: 機制全部屬實:date-grid.tsx:179-188 確在 render body 內定義 inline nav 元件;RDP v9(DayPicker.js:255/:282)以 JSX element type 渲染 components.PreviousMonthButton,故每次 DateGrid render 新 function identity = 新 type = 強制 unmount/remount;iconOnly Button 確自動包 Radix Tooltip(button.tsx「自動包 Tooltip」分支);date-picker.tsx:609/:982 inline onSelect + 無任何 memo,DatePicker 每次 state 變確會 re-render DateGrid。但 impact 有一處被高估:DateGrid 只傳 defaultMonth(非 controlled month),month state 在 RDP 內部——點 nav 按鈕本身不會 re-render DateGrid、不觸發重掛,焦點停在 nav 按鈕的主場景(連點換月)安全;重掛只發生在 DatePicker 外部 state 變時,那時焦點幾乎必在 day cell 或 time input。殘餘行為風險縮到「滑鼠 hover nav tooltip 同時打字」的 flicker 邊角。單次重掛 <1ms(兩顆 xs 按鈕 + Tooltip wrapper),遠低於 10ms 門檻;修法是 module-level hoist 的 hygiene,非效能問題。

refuted.title: Avatar 每個 instance 無條件掛一個 documentElement MutationObserver — 大表格數百 Avatar 時 observer 與 mount 成本堆疊,但 theme 值只有 hoverCard 分支用到
refuted.reason: 機制宣稱逐條驗證屬實:avatar.tsx:148 無條件呼叫 useDocumentTheme,:79-93 每 instance 在 useEffect 掛一個 documentElement MutationObserver(attributeFilter data-theme),documentTheme 只在 :313 hoverCard 分支的 HoverCardContent 消費(:296 early return),grep 確認 DS-wide 無其他消費者 — 無 hoverCard 的 Avatar 確實白付 observer。memo(:363)與 scroll-defer(:296)存在但無法跳過 hook 本身,finding 描述準確。但 impact 屬 noise:(1)「500-row = 500+ observer」情境被 data-table.tsx:1074 VIRTUAL_THRESHOLD=30 虛擬化推翻 — height-constrained 大表只 mount 可視列+overscan(約 15-40 個);(2) DataTable person cell 正是有 hoverCard、會消費 theme 的場景,最不浪費;(3) 單 observer 建置成本 µs 級,即使病態 500 個未虛擬化也僅約 2-5ms mount 開銷 + 遠低於 1MB 記憶體,theme 切換是罕見事件且 finding 自認可接受。Finding 自己也定性為「常數級 hygiene」,低於 10ms noise 門檻。singleton store + useSyncExternalStore 是合理 hygiene 修法但無可量測的 user-facing 影響。

refuted.title: 發佈的 dist/react-day-picker.css 無任何接線 — Calendar/DatePicker 的 base styles 疑似對 published consumer 靜默掉線
refuted.reason: 機械事實全部屬實(date-grid.tsx:10 import / vite.config.ts:74-77 rename / dist JS 剝為 /* empty css */ / exports map + tokens.css aggregator 皆無接線),但 impact 宣稱不成立:react-day-picker v9 的 classNames 是 per-key 取代(DayPicker.js:113 `{...getDefaultClassNames(), ...props.classNames}`),DateGrid 覆蓋了全部 20 個會渲染的 key,rdp-* class 根本不出現在 DOM — style.css 那些規則連 Storybook(css 有載入)也從未生效。逐一排除非覆蓋 key:nav 在 navLayout="around" 下不渲染(DayPicker.js:248/286)、chevron 被 lucide 自訂按鈕取代、dropdowns/week_number/animate 類只在 DatePicker 從未傳的 prop 下渲染(date-picker.tsx:609/982 均 mode="single" 無 captionLayout/animate/showWeekNumber)、weeks/focused 在 style.css 無規則。唯一 match 的 .rdp-root position:relative(僅為不渲染的 .rdp-nav 而設)與 box-sizing(DS base.css:29-32 全域已保證且隨 tokens.css 出貨)皆冗餘。故 published consumer 與 Storybook 視覺零差異,無「靜默跑版」。殘餘僅 hygiene:可刪 inert import 省 2.2KB dead asset;captionLayout="dropdown" passthrough 是 latent 理論缺口(DateGrid 為 @internal,consumer 走 DatePicker wrapper 碰不到),非現行缺陷。
